content.full_text:
January 16, 1991

Peggy Borging,

My name is Lenny Gallegos. I am a Sierra County Supervisor for District 5. I would like an official opinion concerning my employment as a part time on call Ambulance E.M.T. for the Sierra Valley District Hospital, which also has a management agreement with Sierra County. We have a Board of Supervisors meeting on January 22. And subsequent meetings will also have Hospital matters agendized. I would appreciate an opinion as soon as possible. If you have any further questions please call me at (916) 993-4009. I have also enclosed a copy of my last pay check receipt from S.V.D.H.

Thank you
Lenny Gallegos
